---
title: "Wesley’s Designated Successor: The Life, Letters and Literary Labours of the Rev. John William Fletcher, Vicar of Madeley"
---

## Wesley’s Designated Successor: The Life, Letters and Literary Labours of the Rev. John William Fletcher, Vicar of Madeley

**Author:** The Rev. John William Fletcher
**Date:** 1882
**Imprint:** London: Hodder

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
